description: Research the browser compatibility and specification status of five modern CSS features: Container Queries, :has() pseudo-class, Subgrid, color-mix() function, and CSS Nesting. Use MDN Web Docs (developer.mozilla.org), Can I Use (caniuse.com), and W3C specifications (w3.org or drafts.csswg.org) as sources. Create a Firefox bookmark folder named 'CSS Compatibility Research' containing at least five bookmarks from these sources. Generate a JSON report at '~/Documents/css_compatibility_report.json' documenting the first supported version for Chrome, Firefox, and Safari, the specification status (e.g., 'Working Draft', 'CR'), and a recommendation ('safe to use', 'use with fallback', etc.) for each feature
